AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Struggling with stains? Cold Power Extreme Clean Laundry Liquid Washing Detergent is an effective solution for laundry. Add it to your cart at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Cold Power PLUS Extreme Clean Laundry Liquid Washing Detergent 2L, 40 Washloads, Our Best Stain Removal^

Cold Power PLUS Extreme Clean Laundry Liquid Detergent delivers our BEST STAIN REMOVAL^, effective even in cold water and short cycles. Powered by Cold Power’s NEW & IMPROVED Cold Wash Action formula, featuring a unique blend of boosted stain fighting enzymes which is extra tough on dried stains and keeps your whites looking bright.

Backed by 50+ Years of Cold Wash Expertise, Count on Cold Power PLUS Extreme Clean Laundry Liquid for powerful stain removal first time, even washing in quick cycles.

Washing in cold water saves up to 80% energy & is better for the planet, whilst being gentler on your clothes.*

*When switching from warm to cold water. Please refer to https://www.sustainability.vic.gov.au/energy-efficiency-and-reducing-emissions/save-energy-in-the-home/reduce-washing-machine-costs-at-home

^vs other Cold Power Laundry Liquid variants



Backed by 50+ Years of Cold Wash Expertise for trusted, reliable cleaning results

Cold Wash Action formula uses a unique blend of boosted stain fighting enzymes to deliver our BEST STAIN REMOVAL^ in cold water

Extra Tough on Dried Stains

Keeps Whites Looking Bright

Australian Made

TgaAttributes.ProductWarnings: CAUTIONKEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN. IF SWALLOWED: Remove as much product as possible from the mouth. Rinse mouth with water and seek medical attention.EYE IRRITANT: If product contacts the eyes, rinse thoroughly with water. Seek medical attention if irritation persists. Avoid contact with sensitive skin.For Medical Advice call: 13 11 26 (Australia) 0800 764 766 (New Zealand).

  • No inks, dyes or fragrances added

Quilton 2 Ply Hypo-Allergenic Facial Tissues are made for a unique combination of softness and strength. They are hypo-allergenic and dermatologically tested to be extra gentle on sensitive skin. Quilton Facial Tissues are made from sustainably sourced materials.

Quilton Facial Tissues are proudly made in our paper mills and factories in Sydney, Brisbane, Melbourne and Perth. It takes over 600 Aussies across the nation to bring Quilton to you.

Fluffy Fabric Softener

Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Fluffy Fabric Softener Concentrate Vanilla & Coconut' has a supply limit of 10. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

Products.FullDescription: Fluffy Fabric Softener Concentrate Vanilla & Coconut

AdditionalAttributes.storageinstructions: Store in a cool, dry area out of sunlight.
AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Fluffy Ultra Fabric Softener Vanilla & Coconut: Enjoy oh-so soft, fresh clothes with an exotic scent. Reduces static. Shop now at Woolworths!
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Fluffy Divine Blends Coconut & Vanilla Fabric Softener Conditioner gives you a tropical feel and leaves your clothes and fabrics feeling oh-so soft. Suitable for front and top loader machines, and keeps your clothes looking newer for longer.

Trop 'Til You Drop

Get your inner-beach party on with the scent of the deliciously exotic. Is it the warm vanilla or the creamy coconut fragrance that's giving you those tropical feels? Either way, it's as close as you can get to a beach party without getting sand in your shoes.

- Leaves clothes and fabrics feeling oh-so soft
- Long-lasting freshness... yes please!
- Keeps clothes looking newer for longer
- Makes ironing easier (thank us later)
- Reduces static cling so your laundry is as 'ex-static' as you are

Proudly Made in Australia with a recyclable bottle and cap.

Grey Water and Septic Tank Safe. Suitable for top loader and front loader washing machines.

The Fluffy Divine Blends Warm Vanilla & Creamy Coconut Concentrated Liquid Fabric Softener Conditioner in 1.9L can be used for 95 Washes.

Directions for use:
Fill Cap as Shown (1/2 Cap)
In your Top Loader - Fluffy can be added to your machine's fabric softener conditioner dispensing unit or diluted and added to the final rinse.
In your Front Loader - Add Fluffy to your machine's fabric conditioner dispensing unit (often marked with a flower).

SOFTEN YOUR CLOTHES AND FABRICS: Fluffy Concentrated Liquid Fabric Softener Conditioner is suitable for front & top loader machines to soften your clothes and fabrics

DIVINE BLENDS: a Warm Vanilla and Creamy Coconut Fragrant Fabric Softener that gives you a tropical feel

REDUCES STATIC CLING: so your laundry is as 'ex-static' as you are

PACK SIZE: Our 1.9L Fluffy Concentrated Fabric Conditioner can be used for 95 washes

AUSTRALIAN MADE: Our Fluffy Divine Blends Fabric Softener Conditioners are proudly made in Australia

TgaAttributes.ProductWarnings: Keep out of reach of children.
TgaAttributes.StorageInstructions: Store in a cool, dry area out of sunlight.

Bundles.Name: Fluffy Fabric Softener Concentrate Vanilla & Coconut
Bundles.DisplayName: Fluffy Fabric Softener Concentrate Vanilla & Coconut 1.9L

AdditionalAttributes.storageinstructions: Keep in original packaging. Store away from heat, moisture and sunlight.
AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Fighting tough laundry odours? Cold Power Laundry Capsules Odour Fighter is an effective and easy solution for a fresh, clean wash. Add it to your cart at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Cold Power Odour Fighter Laundry Detergent Capsules (29 Washes), Outstanding Stain Removal in Cold Water, Controls and Prevents Bad Odours, Suitable for Front and Top Loader Its advanced clean cold water enzyme formula delivers 3 benefits in one easy to use capsule - outstanding stain removal, malodour prevention & control and fresh scent.

Cold Power Odour Fighter Laundry Detergent Capsules (29 Washes) - For an outstanding clean and odour removal in cold water

Discover outstanding clean in cold water, the easy way with these odour fighter triple washing detergent capsules from Cold Power. The three-in-one odour eliminator formula of these laundry capsules helps to control and prevent bad odours, such as food and sweat malodour, while offering a fresh scent and outstanding stain removal, so you can enjoy visibly clean laundry that smells fresh and clean.
Cold water washing saves up to 80% less energy?, therefore reducing the environmental impact of you doing your laundry while being gentler on your clothes.

How to use: Recommended dosage is one capsule per load or 2 capsules for heavy loads. First place the washing detergent capsules directly into the empty drum, then add clothes on top of the capsule. Do not place in dispensing drawer. Not suitable for hand wash.

These Cold Power washing detergent capsules use 90% less water in production**, are made with 92% biodegradable ingredients#, contain less than 0.5% phosphorus, and are greywater septic safe. Keep out of sight and reach of children.

Product benefits at a glance:
Effective stain removal
Eliminates odours
Prevents odour build-up
Outstanding clean
Unique cold water enzyme formula
Suitable for front loader and top loader washing machines
For approx. 29 washloads

?when switching from warm to cold water
#Related to organic ingredients according to OECD 301/302
**Compared to cold power liquids

Odour Removal and Prevention: The Cold Power capsules remove unpleasant smells such as food and sweat malodour and keeps odours from settling in your laundry

Outstanding Stain Removal: With its cold water laundry detergent enzyme, these Cold Power laundry detergent capsules effectively remove tough stains, so you can enjoy visibly clean laundry

The Easy Way: These capsules deliver 3 benefits in 1 easy to use cap. It provides odour fighting benefits, outstanding stain removal, and a fresh scent, while being suitable for front and top loader washing machines

More Sustainable: Washing your clothes in cold water saves up to 80% less energy?, helping to reduce the environmental impact whilst being gentler on your clothes

Better For The Planet: These laundry capsules use 90% less water in production**, contain 92% biodegradable ingredients#, and are also greywater septic safe

TgaAttributes.StorageInstructions: Keep in original packaging. Store away from heat, moisture and sunlight.

Bundles.DisplayName: Cold Power Laundry Capsules Odour Fighter 29 pack

Kleenex Aloe Vera & Vitamin E tissues with Softcoat Lotion Technology to help soothe your skin.

Kleenex Aloe Vera & Vitamin E tissues feature Softcoat Lotion Technology, carefully coated with natural Aloe Vera and Vitamin E to help soothe your skin

Perfect for times when sniffles and sneezes make your nose feel extra sensitive

3-ply thickness, 95 sheets per box, 20.5cm x 19.5cm

Our Kleenex Aloe Vera & Vitamin E Facial Tissues are Aussie made and we’re proud of it; they’ve been made at our Millicent mill in South Australia since 1966. This means support for local communities, including hundreds of local employees and their families, each year.

FSC Certified, ensuring responsible forest management, meeting the most rigorous environmental and social standard for responsible forest management.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Handee Ultra Paper Towel. A versatile product, super absorbent and strong wet or dry, it's ideal for household messes. Add it to your cart at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Handee Ultra Paper Towel with interlock weave is ultra strong and ultra absorbent. Food Safe, Lint and Streak Free.

Advanced paper making technology makes Handee Ultra paper towel super absorbent and ultra strong; wet or dry.

Specially selected fibres within the paper towel are made to interlock, creating both greater strength and a sponge-like structure for maximum absorption.

Whatever the job, be sure to Keep It Handee



Through Air Dried (TAD) Technology - Using air to gently blow through and relax the paper fibres, resulting in the perfect balance of superior absorbency and strength.

6 Layers - Crafted with triple-layered technology, 6 stratified layers of delicately blended and select fibres create a sponge-like structure to absorb liquids rapidly.

Versatile - A high quality multipurpose paper towel to tackle messes, inside or outside your home.

SUPER ABSORBENT and SUPER STRONG, Handee Ultra Paper Towel can cope with spills, splatter or mess in any corner of your house

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Enjoy Sorbent Soft & Strong Toilet Paper, perfect for daily comfort. With its soft, strong sheets, it's a reliable choice. Order online from Woolworths today.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
NOW IN 3 PLY. Sorbent Silky White toilet tissue. Always soft, always strong.

NOW IN 3 PLY. No matter where we're from, or what we do, one thing's for sure - we all have to spend time on the loo. We've supported Aussies through and through, since we first wiped a bum back in 1952! That's true! With more than 70 years of looking after your crack, it's no wonder Aussies love us back. Our Silky White is always soft to pamper your bum, it won't let you down because it is always strong. Always soft, and always strong; because when it's all said and done, all we want is a clean, fresh bum.

Extra Thick - Thick sheets for more protection

Extra Soft - Soft sheets for more gentle comfort

PEFC certified

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Handee Ultra Double Length White Paper Towel. A super absorbent product with strong fibres, it's ideal for cleaning. Add it to your cart at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Handee Ultra Double Length Paper Towel with interlock weave is ultra strong and ultra absorbent. Food Safe, Lint and Streak Free.

Advanced paper making technology makes Handee Ultra paper towel super absorbent and ultra strong; wet or dry.

Specially selected fibres within the paper towel are made to interlock, creating both greater strength and a sponge-like structure for maximum absorption.

Whatever the job, be sure to Keep It Handee



Through Air Dried (TAD) Technology - Using air to gently blow through and relax the paper fibres, resulting in the perfect balance of superior absorbency and strength.

6 Layers - Crafted with triple-layered technology, 6 stratified layers of delicately blended and select fibres create a sponge-like structure to absorb liquids rapidly.

Versatile - A high quality multipurpose paper towel to tackle messes, inside or outside your home.

Double Length Rolls - Each double length roll is equal to two standard rolls

SUPER ABSORBENT and SUPER STRONG, Handee Ultra Paper Towel can cope with spills, splatter or mess in any corner of your house

TgaAttributes.ProductWarnings:
- Keep clear of naked flames, grillers and heating elements.
- Woolworths Select Baking Paper is resistant to 230°C or 450°F and can be used in conventional and microwave ovens.
- When using to line frypans, ensure pan is set on a low-medium heat.
- When baking, use baking paper to line your trays or cake tins.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Need a reliable clean? Kleenex Complete Clean White Toilet Paper is a soft and strong solution for your daily needs. Order online from Woolworths today.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Kleenex® Complete Clean Toilet Tissue with unique CleanRipple® texture has a 3-in-1 combination of softness, strength & absorbency for a comfortable and reliable clean. Try it today and make a change for the better!

• With CleanRipple® technology, specifically designed to provide a 3-in-1 combination of softness, strength and absorbency.
• Made from ethically sourced fibre that promotes the sustainable management of forests, Kleenex® Toilet Tissue has earned Forest Stewardship Council® (FSC) certification - the highest possible independent standard for responsible forest management.
• Recommended for use alongside Kleenex® Flushable Wipes to help you feel shower fresh
• At least 35% thicker sheets vs 2ply toilet tissue designed for a superior clean.
• Kleenex® Toilet Paper is hypoallergenic, biodegradable and septic tank safe.

Kleenex® Complete Clean Toilet Tissue with unique CleanRipple® texture has a 3-in-1 combination of softness, strength & absorbency for a comfortable and reliable clean. Try it today and make a change for the better!
By choosing Kleenex® Toilet Tissue you can be assured that the product you're purchasing does not come from high conversation value forests, which may be home to rare, threatened or endangered animals and ecosystems. So, when you buy Kleenex Brand® Toilet Tissue you can be confident that you are doing your bit to help the environment.

Bundles.DisplayName: Kleenex Complete Clean White Toilet Paper 24 pack
